lintExempt.rationale: Re-affirmed 2026-04-15 (task #22 audit, post-v0.20.0 / post-PR #208). These phase JSONs are shipped historical execution records of PH-01 through PH-04 work; no automated runtime consumer exists (verified: zero grep hits in `server/**`, zero references in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, zero usage in test suites, ac-lint is a pure function library that only runs on caller-supplied plans). The only voluntary consumer is `forge_lint_refresh planPath=<this-file>`, which is an audit-time operation against a specific path and would only re-surface pre-existing F-55/F-56 violations describing already-shipped work. Live drift in newly authored plans is prevented by `npm run lint` (CI-enforced via PR #208) and per-call ac-lint, not by retroactive cleanup of historical records. Original C1-bootstrap "we'll unwind later" framing superseded — exemption retained as the correct end-state for shipped artifacts. Unwind via `grep -l 2026-04-13-c1-bootstrap .ai-workspace/plans/*.json` only if a future runtime consumer is added that would load these files automatically.

stories.title: Add optional baselineCheck and lineage fields to ExecutionPlan schema

acceptanceCriteria.description: ExecutionPlan interface has optional baselineCheck field of type string
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'baselineCheck?.*string' server/types/execution-plan.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: Story interface has optional lineage field with tier and sourceId
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'lineage?' server/types/execution-plan.ts && grep -q 'tier.*sourceId\|sourceId.*tier' server/types/execution-plan.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: Validation accepts plans with baselineCheck field without errors
acceptanceCriteria.command: export TMP=$(mktemp) && npx vitest run server/validation/execution-plan.test.ts -t 'baselineCheck' --reporter=json --outputFile="$TMP" >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.TMP,'utf8')); process.exit(r.success && r.numFailedTests===0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Validation accepts stories with lineage field without errors
acceptanceCriteria.command: export TMP=$(mktemp) && npx vitest run server/validation/execution-plan.test.ts -t 'lineage' --reporter=json --outputFile="$TMP" >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.TMP,'utf8')); process.exit(r.success && r.numFailedTests===0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Existing validation tests still pass (backward compatibility)
acceptanceCriteria.command: export TMP=$(mktemp) && npx vitest run server/validation/execution-plan.test.ts --reporter=json --outputFile="$TMP" >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.TMP,'utf8')); process.exit(r.success && r.numFailedTests===0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: TypeScript compilation succeeds with new fields

stories.title: Define GenerateResult, GenerationBrief, FixBrief, and Escalation type interfaces

acceptanceCriteria.description: GenerateResult interface exported with action, storyId, iteration, maxIterations fields
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface GenerateResult' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'action:' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: GenerationBrief interface exported with story, codebaseContext, gitBranch, baselineCheck fields
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface GenerationBrief' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'gitBranch' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: FixBrief interface exported with failedCriteria, score, evalHint, guidance fields
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface FixBrief' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'evalHint' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: Escalation interface exported with reason enum, description, hypothesis, lastEvalVerdict, scoreHistory, diagnostics fields
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface Escalation' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'scoreHistory' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: EscalationDiagnostics interface exported with exitCode, stderr, failingTests fields (REQ-15)
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'exitCode' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'failingTests' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: CostEstimate interface exported with briefTokens, projectedIterationCostUsd, projectedRemainingCostUsd fields
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface CostEstimate' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'projectedIterationCostUsd' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: DiffManifest interface exported with changed, unchanged, new fields (REQ-14)
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'export interface DiffManifest' server/types/generate-result.ts && grep -q 'changed.*string' server/types/generate-result.ts

acceptanceCriteria.description: TypeScript compilation succeeds
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx tsc --noEmit

stories.title: Implement all 5 stopping conditions (REQ-03, REQ-04, REQ-05, REQ-07, REQ-15)

acceptanceCriteria.description: Plateau detection: previousScores [0.5, 0.5, 0.5] triggers escalation with reason 'plateau'
acceptanceCriteria.command: export TMP=$(mktemp) && npx vitest run server/lib/generator.test.ts -t 'plateau' --reporter=json --outputFile="$TMP" >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.TMP,'utf8')); process.exit(r.success && r.numFailedTests===0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: No-op detection: matching fileHashes triggers escalation with reason 'no-op'
acceptanceCriteria.command: export TMP=$(mktemp) && npx vitest run server/lib/generator.test.ts -t 'no-op' --reporter=json --outputFile="$TMP" >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.TMP,'utf8')); process.exit(r.success && r.numFailedTests===0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Max iterations: iteration >= maxIterations triggers escalation with reason 'max-iterations'
acceptanceCriteria.command: export TMP=$(mktemp) && npx vitest run server/lib/generator.test.ts -t 'max-iterations' --reporter=json --outputFile="$TMP" >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.TMP,'utf8')); process.exit(r.success && r.numFailedTests===0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: INCONCLUSIVE: verdict INCONCLUSIVE triggers immediate escalation regardless of other conditions
acceptanceCriteria.command: export TMP=$(mktemp) && npx vitest run server/lib/generator.test.ts -t 'inconclusive' --reporter=json --outputFile="$TMP" >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.TMP,'utf8')); process.exit(r.success && r.numFailedTests===0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Baseline-failed: escalation includes diagnostics with exitCode, stderr (truncated to 2000 chars), and failingTests
acceptanceCriteria.command: export TMP=$(mktemp) && npx vitest run server/lib/generator.test.ts -t 'baseline-failed\|baseline.*diagnostics' --reporter=json --outputFile="$TMP" >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.TMP,'utf8')); process.exit(r.success && r.numFailedTests===0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Continue when improving: previousScores [0.3, 0.5] does NOT trigger any stopping condition
acceptanceCriteria.command: export TMP=$(mktemp) && npx vitest run server/lib/generator.test.ts -t 'continue when improving\|continue.*improving' --reporter=json --outputFile="$TMP" >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.TMP,'utf8')); process.exit(r.success && r.numFailedTests===0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: INCONCLUSIVE takes precedence over all other stopping conditions
acceptanceCriteria.command: export TMP=$(mktemp) && npx vitest run server/lib/generator.test.ts -t 'INCONCLUSIVE.*precedence\|precedence.*INCONCLUSIVE' --reporter=json --outputFile="$TMP" >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.TMP,'utf8')); process.exit(r.success && r.numFailedTests===0 ? 0 : 1)"

acceptanceCriteria.description: Plateau boundary case: previousScores [0.3, 0.5, 0.5] triggers plateau (improving then stuck)
acceptanceCriteria.command: export TMP=$(mktemp) && npx vitest run server/lib/generator.test.ts -t 'plateau.*boundary\|improving.*plateau\|0.3.*0.5.*0.5' --reporter=json --outputFile="$TMP" >/dev/null 2>&1; node -e "const r=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(process.env.TMP,'utf8')); process.exit(r.success && r.numFailedTests===0 ? 0 : 1)"
